nasb.text: Then you will take delight in the Lord, And I will make you ride on the heights of the earth; And I will feed you with the heritage of Jacob your father, For the mouth of the Lord has spoken.”

esv.text: then you shall take delight in the Lord, and I will make you ride on the heights of the earth; I will feed you with the heritage of Jacob your father, for the mouth of the Lord has spoken.”

cnv.text: 你就必以耶和華為樂， 我要使你乘駕地的高處， 用你祖雅各的產業餵養你。” 這是耶和華親口說的。

ccb.text: 就必以耶和华为乐， 耶和华必使你们在地上受尊崇， 并享用你们先祖雅各的产业。’” 这是耶和华亲口说的。

csbs.text: 那么，你就必以我耶和华为乐； 我要使你乘驾于大地的高处， 并要用你先祖雅各的继业养活你。” 这是耶和华亲口说的。
